changeSet.author: Arslan Kalaitsidis
changeSet.createView: SELECT H.hotel_url FROM hotels H INNER JOIN hotel_seeds HS on H.id = HS.hotel_id WHERE interested_customers > 0

changeSet.author: Arslan Kalaitsidis
changeSet.createView: select h.hotel_url,d.distance_days from distances d inner join monitor_list ml on d.monitor_list_id = ml.id inner join monitor_list_details mld on ml.id = mld.monitor_list_id inner join hotel_rooms r on mld.room_id = r.id inner join hotels h on r.hotel_id = h.id group by h.hotel_url, d.distance_days;

changeSet.author: Arslan Kalaitsidis
changeSet.createView: select h.hotel_url as hotel_url,d.distance_days as distance_days from distances d inner join monitor_list ml on d.monitor_list_id = ml.id inner join monitor_list_details mld on ml.id = mld.monitor_list_id inner join hotel_rooms r on mld.room_id = r.id inner join hotels h on r.hotel_id = h.id group by h.hotel_url, d.distance_days;
